author: Vertyco
description: Interact with the Taalas LLM API powered by custom silicon-embedded model weights.
end_user_data_statement: This cog stores conversation history per user for continuity with the Taalas LLM. Users can clear their data with the clearconvo command.
install_msg:
Thank you for installing Taalas!

A bot owner must set the API key before use:
`[p]set api taalas api_key <your_key>`
short: Chat with the Taalas LLM API.
